mapper.select:
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier
supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierCode}, '%')
AND
( supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') )
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier
supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierCode}, '%')
AND
( supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') )

SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier
supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierCode}, '%')
AND
( supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') OR supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') )
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND id != #{excludeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier WHERE supplier_name = #{supplierName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM supplier WHERE supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier ( supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{contactPerson}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
